item.title: Walmart is selling a compact 8-tier bookshelf for $76 that fits almost anywhere
Walmart is selling a fleece zip-up jacket for just $11 that comes in 15 colors
item.description: One shopper said, "This is a fantastic purchase for the money."

item.title: Ugg's 'luxuriously soft' throw blanket is 48% off at Amazon right now
item.description: "This is so luxuriously soft and gorgeous — everything you'd expect from Ugg."

item.title: Valero CEO grabs billion dollar Venezuela oil advantage
item.description: The U.S. reset the global oil battlefield in January, removing Venezuelan President Nicolas Maduro and unlocking access to 303 billion barrels of oil—...

item.title: New IRS rule could lead to big problems getting tax refund checks
item.description: For many taxpayers, IRS refunds are a crucial source of income that can be used to pay down debt or cover major expenses. The refunds serve as a form ...
